'''mowapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphoidal|xiphoidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphoidal|xiphoidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mowapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowapithi|mowapithi]] || [[word:mowapiji|mowapiji]] || [[word:mowapishi|mowapishi]] || [[word:mowapiki|mowapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowaputhuthu|mowaputhuthu]] || [[word:mowapujuju|mowapujuju]] || [[word:mowapushushu|mowapushushu]] || [[word:mowapukuku|mowapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowaputhu|mowaputhu]] || [[word:mowapuju|mowapuju]] || [[word:mowapushu|mowapushu]] || [[word:mowapuku|mowapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowapufthuf|mowapufthuf]] || [[word:mowapufjuf|mowapufjuf]] || [[word:mowapufshuf|mowapufshuf]] || [[word:mowapufkuf|mowapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowapethe|mowapethe]] || [[word:mowapeje|mowapeje]] || [[word:mowapeshe|mowapeshe]] || [[word:mowapeke|mowapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowapothotho|mowapothotho]] || [[word:mowapojojo|mowapojojo]] || [[word:mowaposhosho|mowaposhosho]] || [[word:mowapokoko|mowapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowapotho|mowapotho]] || [[word:mowapojo|mowapojo]] || [[word:mowaposho|mowaposho]] || [[word:mowapoko|mowapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowapofthof|mowapofthof]] || [[word:mowapofjof|mowapofjof]] || [[word:mowapofshof|mowapofshof]] || [[word:mowapofkof|mowapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfthÃŸf|mowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfjÃŸf|mowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfshÃŸf|mowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfkÃŸf|mowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|mowapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|mowapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|mowapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|mowapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfthÃŸf|mowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfjÃŸf|mowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfshÃŸf|mowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfkÃŸf|mowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfthÃŸf|mowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfjÃŸf|mowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfshÃŸf|mowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mowapÃŸfkÃŸf|mowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowapÃḊthÃḊ|mowapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:mowapÃḊjÃḊ|mowapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:mowapÃḊshÃḊ|mowapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:mowapÃḊkÃḊ|mowapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowapathatha|mowapathatha]] || [[word:mowapajaja|mowapajaja]] || [[word:mowapashasha|mowapashasha]] || [[word:mowapakaka|mowapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowapatha|mowapatha]] || [[word:mowapaja|mowapaja]] || [[word:mowapasha|mowapasha]] || [[word:mowapaka|mowapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowapafthaf|mowapafthaf]] || [[word:mowapafjaf|mowapafjaf]] || [[word:mowapafshaf|mowapafshaf]] || [[word:mowapafkaf|mowapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mowapasha|mowapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mowapshÃḋsha|mowapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mowaprosha|mowaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mowapmusha|mowapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mowapyasha|mowapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomowapnkshÃḋsha|gomowapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomowapnkrosha|gomowapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomowapnkmusha|gomowapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomowapnkyasha|gomowapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mowawapasha|mowawapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mowawapshÃḋsha|mowawapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mowawaprosha|mowawaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mowawapmusha|mowawapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mowawapyasha|mowawapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomowawapnkshÃḋsha|gomowawapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomowawapnkrosha|gomowawapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomowawapnkmusha|gomowawapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomowawapnkyasha|gomowawapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mewÃḊpasha|mewÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mewÃḊpshÃḋsha|mewÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mewÃḊprosha|mewÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mewÃḊpmusha|mewÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mewÃḊpyasha|mewÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomewÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gomewÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomewÃḊpnkrosha|gomewÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomewÃḊpnkmusha|gomewÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomewÃḊpnkyasha|gomewÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mowfapasha|mowfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mowfapshÃḋsha|mowfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mowfaprosha|mowfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mowfapmusha|mowfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mowfapyasha|mowfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomowfapnkshÃḋsha|gomowfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomowfapnkrosha|gomowfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomowfapnkmusha|gomowfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomowfapnkyasha|gomowfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
